headline: Electronic Arts Battlefield Cuts Reshape AI Plans And Buyout Outlook
summary: Electronic Arts (NasdaqGS:EA) is cutting staff at its major Battlefield studios as part of a broad restructuring focused on core franchises and efficiency. The layoffs are taking place ahead of a proposed US$55b acquisition led by the Saudi Public Investment Fund and Silver Lake. The planned transaction and workforce changes are expected to influence EA's studio footprint, use of AI tools, and creative priorities across its portfolio. For you as an investor, this sits at the intersection of...
